channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Looking at campaign documents for 7 IOC members running to be president of the Olympic body
item.description: Seven International Olympic Committee members are running as candidates to be the next president in its first election since 2013.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Bay FC Treasure Island training facility lease approved by SF mayor
item.description: (BCN) --San Francisco Mayor London Breed signed legislation on Thursday that will allow the women's professional soccer team Bay Football Club, or Bay FC, to make Treasure Island their future home with a permanent training center.
item.dc:creator: Bay City News, KRON4

item.title: Falcons' Cousins says he 'didn't forget how to play quarterback' after losing starting job to Penix
item.description: FLOWERY BRANCH, Ga. (AP) — Kirk Cousins was signed to a massive four-year deal with the Atlanta Falcons because he was perceived to be the missing piece at quarterback for a team that otherwise was ready for a return to the playoffs. Cousins lost his starting job to rookie Michael Penix Jr.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Boys Basketball: Santa Fe Christian 63, Coronado 39
item.description: Boys basketball action taking place at Coronado High School as the Islanders take on #4 ranked Santa Fe Christian.
item.dc:creator: Allison Edmonds, Fox 5

item.title: Boston's Sports Bar & Restaurant's 'Gather Your Herd' Sweepstakes
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — With the NFL playoffs quickly approaching, Boston’s Pizza is giving six lucky fans a chance to celebrate Denver’s postseason push at the ultimate football watch party. “We’ve got some really nice TVs in our bar,” said Brandon Cramer, Boston’s Pizza general manager.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: LAFC, LA Galaxy to join 18 other pro soccer teams for preseason event in Southern California
item.description: Both of L.A.’s professional men’s soccer clubs will join 18 other teams – including six women’s teams – for the 2025 Coachella Valley Invitational. Preseason matches at the Empire Polo Club in Indio begin on Feb.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: BYU excited to face Heisman winner Travis Hunter
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - As BYU continues preparation for the Alamo Bowl December 28th against Colorado, they are looking forward to facing off against Heisman Trophy Winner Travis Hunter. Hunter is truly a one-of-a-kind player.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Mahomes throws 2 TD passes, leaves with ankle injury in Chiefs' 21-7 win. X-rays negative on star QB
item.description: Mahomes threw two touchdown passes before limping off with an ankle injury in the fourth quarter, Xavier Worthy ran for a score and Kansas City finally had a relatively easy win, 21-7 over the mistake-prone Cleveland Browns.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Southampton fires Russell Martin after 5-0 rout by Spurs on a bad day for Premier League managers
item.description: Southampton fired manager Russell Martin late Sunday after the Premier League's last-placed team was thrashed 5-0 by Tottenham.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Duke lacrosse players' rape accuser admits she lied
item.description: The former exotic dancer confessed to lying about the encounter in 2006 during her appearance on the “Let’s Talk with Kat” podcast.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, NewsNation
